activities.title: Receive Codex Provider Call
activities.description: Entry point for a codex doStream call from the runloop; provides the request inputs, providerOptions, and session identity that downstream activities consume

activities.title: Stream Codex WebSocket Frames
activities.description: transport-ws.ts wsRequest opens WebSocket; observes frames and terminal events; on ws.onerror / ws.onclose frame=0 / first_frame_timeout sets wsObs.wsErrorReason and calls endStream() instead of endWithError (DD-2 throw-leak closure)

activities.title: Translate SSE Events
activities.description: sse.ts mapResponseStream converts SSE frames to LMv2 parts; flush block detects effectively-empty turn and invokes the classifier with the TransportSnapshot (now including wsErrorReason)

activities.title: Classify Empty Turn Cause
activities.description: empty-turn-classifier evaluates predicate ladder per DD-9; ws_no_frames covers both clean close-without-frames and onerror-without-frames cases (wsErrorReason field discriminates sub-cause without enum churn)

activities.title: Persist Forensic Evidence
activities.description: empty-turn-log writes JSONL line with the wsErrorReason field; cache-equilibrium-detector writes a separate JSONL channel when DD-1 observes N consecutive identical cache.read values

activities.title: Derive Cache Miss Prediction
activities.description: DD-1: prompt.ts derivePredictedCacheMiss helper returns hit/miss/unknown based on lastFinished.tokens.cache.read instead of sticky continuationInvalidatedAt flag, breaking the L1 stable equilibrium that locked cache_read at 36352

activities.title: Gate Account Rotation
activities.description: DD-3: processor.ts isModelTemporaryError reads providerMetadata.openai.emptyTurnClassification.causeFamily as opaque metadata; if present, returns false so the rotation cascade triggered by L2 throw-leak no longer fires when classifier already handled the empty turn

arrows.label: cache equilibrium detection event when locked
